task_description: Create comprehensive test suites across frontend (Flutter) and backend (FastAPI) with CI/CD. S100B: Frontend unit tests, S100C: Frontend widget tests (both on feature/project-setup-resolved). S100D-S100H: Backend unit/integration/security/e2e tests and GitHub Actions CI/CD (on feature/backend-setup).

verification.summary: Frontend: 71 tests pass (48 unit + 23 widget) on feature/project-setup-resolved. Backend: 70 tests pass (50 unit + 10 integration + 7 security + 3 e2e) with 73% coverage on feature/backend-setup. All test files exercise real code paths with meaningful assertions. CI/CD workflows created.
